nasb.text: They have lied about the Lord And said, “Not He; Misfortune will not come on us, And we will not see sword or famine.

esv.text: They have spoken falsely of the Lord and have said, ‘He will do nothing; no disaster will come upon us, nor shall we see sword or famine.

cnv.text: 他們不信耶和華， 說：“他不會作甚麼， 災禍必不臨到我們， 我們也不會看見刀劍和饑荒。

ccb.text: “他们撒谎说， ‘耶和华不会管我们， 我们必不会遇到灾祸、战争和饥荒。
